Hello dear, I hope you are doing great ð I just wanted to share the love of our Creator this winter, because everyone needs to know His immense sacrificial, love ð He sees you, He knows you by name and He is the one who has blessed you and waits for you to return to Him always ðâï¸ Jesus Christ loves you so much that He died for you so that you can get a chance to live eternally with Him in peace, health and joy ðHe took the penalty for our sins and crucified them on the Cross âï¸ So that we now put all our trust in Him for eternal life and abandon the old life that leads to destruction ð I'm talking from experience, I was living in sin, was prideful, greedy, idolatrous (yoga, tarot), lustful and making others lust, jealous, selfish, also had years long anxiety, insomnia, sleep paralysis and Christ Jesus freed me from all of that âï¸ He is the only way to Heaven ð He loves you incredibly and He wants us all to repent and live a Holy life with Him ðï¸
